DAILY MEAL PLAN

  1. Breakfast

    • Main Dish :Pancakes
      • Maple Syrup
      • Fresh Berries
      • Whipped Cream
    • Side:Fruit Salad
    • Drink:Orange Juice

  2. Lunch

    • Main Course:Your own sandwich
      1. Start with 2 bread Slices
      2. Add a layer of Cheese
      3. Finish with Tomatos and Lettuce
    • Side:Potato
    • Beverage:Iced Tea

  3. Dinner

    • Appertizer:Garlic bread
    • Main course:Pasta
      • First take the pasta
      • Next,ladle Some sauce on it
      • Finally,Sprinkle some Cottage Cheese
    • Dessert:Kulfi
